description: Create EXPERIMENT.md with comprehensive experiment design documentation and link it from README.md.
steps: Create EXPERIMENT.md at project root with sections: Overview & Goals, Methodology, Actors & Setup, Prompting Patterns & Meta-Prompts, Issue History Summary, Key Decisions & Trade-offs, Preliminary Observations
Add link to EXPERIMENT.md in README.md Table of Contents
Add link to EXPERIMENT.md in README.md Further Reading table
Add a section reference in README.md pointing to EXPERIMENT.md
acceptance_criteria: EXPERIMENT.md exists at project root with comprehensive experiment design documentation
EXPERIMENT.md includes all required sections: Overview & Goals, Methodology, Actors & Setup, Prompting Patterns, Issue History, Key Decisions, Preliminary Observations
README.md Table of Contents links to EXPERIMENT.md
README.md Further Reading table includes EXPERIMENT.md
Document serves as foundation for final evaluation of the experiment
findings: Documentation-only change. Created EXPERIMENT.md (300+ lines) with comprehensive experiment design covering: Overview & Goals, Methodology (TDD, issue-driven, architecture-as-code), Actors & Setup (5x3 matrix), Prompting Patterns, Issue History (14 issues summarized), Key Decisions & Trade-offs (7 decisions), Preliminary Observations (strengths, challenges, comparative notes), Metrics, and Future Evaluation Criteria. Updated README.md with Table of Contents link, Experiment Design section, and Further Reading entry.
